{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Azura (Cradle)
| introduced = Reaper
}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[The Mad King]] manifests holding a black Scythe.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c3">''Reaper'', chapter 3</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
